candidates.title: Launching Health in ChatGPT
candidates.summary: Health in ChatGPT now lets eligible U.S. users securely connect medical records and Apple Health to get more personalized insights and better understand their health.

candidates.title: AI chip startup Etched defies skeptics, hits $10.3B valuation from big-name investors
candidates.summary: Etched, founded by three Harvard dropouts, has created new chips and memory components that speed up inference on any AI model -- no GPUs required, it says.

candidates.title: Google’s Gemini nears billion-user milestone
candidates.summary: Gemini had over 750 million monthly users in February.
